title: Tree Capitator
description: Tree Capitator datapack helps you chop down entire trees with a single swing! A lightweight and performance-optimized pack that saves your time.
body:
**🪓 About This Datapack**

Tired of spending hours clearing forests or leaving floating treetops in your world? Tree Capitator brings a seamless woodcutting experience to your survival world. Simply break the bottom log of a tree with an axe, and the entire tree will come crashing down!

**✨ Features**

Compatibility: Fully compatible with all wood types, including the new Pale Oak (1.21.4) and Mangrove.

Performance First: Written with optimized recursion logic to ensure zero server lag, even when chopping large jungle trees.

Smart Detection: Only activates when using an Axe—no accidental house-destruction while using your hands or other tools!

Multi-Wood Support: Works with all logs including Cherry, Bamboo, Crimson, and Warped stems.
